name: tChartXYZ #9: Chart. SPICE Awakening (October 16, 2025)
description:
# tChartXYZ Chart #9: SPICE Dragon Awake
SPICE – the sleeping dragon that slumbered long, but now it's awake to roast all enemies in the righteous fire of spicy flames! This Rare chart captures the 3-day bar awakening.
